example_prompt: Complete a checkout payment after the customer has selected their payment method on the Bictorys-hosted page.

chargeId.description: UUID of the charge to complete. Obtained from the create_charge 202 response (chargeId field).

opToken.description: Operation token from the create_charge 202 response (opToken field). Must be sent in the Op-Token header.

payment_type.description: Payment method query param. Optional — if omitted, the customer selects on the Bictorys page. Same enum as create_charge: wave_money, orange_money, mtn_money, card, etc.

successRedirectUrl.description: HTTPS URL to redirect the customer after successful payment.

errorRedirectUrl.description: HTTPS URL to redirect the customer on failure.

response_schema.description: HTTP 201 — returns a ConfirmationLinkObject, identical to the direct create_charge flow.

redirectUrl.description: URL to redirect the customer to complete payment.

qrCode.description: Base64-encoded QR code for mobile money confirmation.

gotchas: This endpoint is the second step of the hosted-checkout flow. It is called only after create_charge returned HTTP 202 (CheckoutLinkObject) and the customer has interacted with the Bictorys-hosted page. Do not call it on a 201 create_charge response.
opToken must be sent as the Op-Token HTTP header, not in the request body. The chargeId goes in the URL path.
Both chargeId and opToken come from the create_charge 202 response — store them before redirecting the customer.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
